quotes.text: Setting up meetings here is
quotes.author: like wrangling cats.

quotes.author: want a very mad pregnant woman on your hands...

quotes.author: NOW!  NOW!

quotes.text: You got a nice deep case...

quotes.author: tundra known as my desk.

quotes.author: turns into a big black hole

quotes.author: to open their mouths.

quotes.text: Our previous game was VD, then we had SCK as
quotes.author: in SICK, and this game is STD. What's up

quotes.author: of my head. Hair is growing inward instead
